milestone: Welcome screen project card corner fix
slice: The Rename/Delete controls on each My World Projects card sat inline at the row's vertical center, right where they visually collided with the status/badge chip beneath the project name (most visible once a real Personal/Official badge started appearing there). Anchored them to the card's own top-right corner instead (position: absolute, top/right 10px), with extra right padding reserved on the card so the name/meta-line text never runs underneath them. No behavior change -- Rename/Delete still call the same ProjectModel.setIdentity/ProjectStore.remove functions, only their position moved.
